plugins.name: Trivia Game
plugins.description: Multiple-choice trivia pulled live from opentdb.com, with win tracking and a server leaderboard. Optional economy coin rewards.
plugins.author: sewdohe

plugins.name: Starboard Messages
plugins.description: Configurable Starboard plugin to memoralize community-selected messages.
plugins.author: sewdohe

plugins.name: Astronomical Picture of the Day
plugins.description: Simple plugin that fetches Nasa's APOD and displays it in an embed, along with it's description.
plugins.author: sewdohe

plugins.name: Support Tickets
plugins.description: Enables opening and closing of support tickets from a configured embed. Tickets private between staff and opener
plugins.author: sewdohe
